content: The relative performance gap between intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM), random network distillation (RND), and standalone curious agents can be predicted by how well each framework leverages an active learning-aligned graded episodic memory, where SOTA 2024-2025 active learning agent memory architectures outperform older monolithic memory setups by prioritizing high-uncertainty memory retention that aligns directly with intrinsic curiosity reward signals.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
